ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Motion For Substitution Of Attorney
Off Calendar Mar-26-2014 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Feb-26-2014 Continued To Jun-02-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amir Atashi Rang for and with Stephen Hung.

Mr. Rang stated that Attorney Donald Hung abandoned this case and that his efforts in trying to effectuate substitution of attorney have failed. In addition, Mr. Rang requested a 90-day continuance stating that he can assist Mr. Hung, and that he can get a waiver of accounting and petition for final distribution filed. Status on close of estate was continued to June 2, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on filing of a motion for substitution of attorney was set for March 26, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Feb-26-2014 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Jan-15-2014 Continued To Feb-26-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the the Attorney and the Administrator to appear on February 26, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show the condition of the estate and the reasons why the estate cannot be closed. The status hearing was also continued to that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
